Why Choose Us

The difference.

What sets us apart in delivering care that patients trust.

Highly Specialised

Focused exclusively on neurology. Deep expertise in migraine, epilepsy, stroke, and movement disorders.

Well Experienced

Over 9 years of clinical practice with 10,000+ patients and 5,000+ successful neurological procedures.

Personalised

Every treatment plan is tailored to the patient's condition, lifestyle, and specific neurological goals.

Proven Results

Transparent outcomes backed by patient success stories and documented recovery rates.

Conditions We Treat

What we treat.

From common to complex conditions -- each diagnosis is approached with precision and care.

Migraine

Migraine

Severe recurring headaches often with nausea and light sensitivity. Highly treatable with the right diagnosis and plan.

Learn more
Epilepsy

Epilepsy

A neurological disorder causing recurrent seizures. Most cases are effectively controlled with modern medications.

Learn more
Stroke

Stroke

Caused by disrupted blood supply to the brain. Early treatment and rehabilitation significantly improves recovery.

Learn more
Parkinson's Disease

Parkinson's Disease

A progressive movement disorder causing tremors and stiffness. Managed effectively with medications and therapy.

Learn more
View All Conditions
Procedures

What we do.

Minimally invasive and surgical procedures performed with modern techniques and premium equipment.

EEG Test

EEG Test

Records electrical activity in the brain to diagnose epilepsy, sleep disorders, and neurological conditions.

Learn more
Nerve Conduction Study

Nerve Conduction Study

Measures how quickly electrical signals move through nerves to detect neuropathy and nerve damage.

Learn more
Botox for Migraine

Botox for Migraine

Preventive Botox injections reduce the frequency and severity of chronic migraines with long-lasting results.

Learn more
Stroke Rehabilitation

Stroke Rehabilitation Therapy

Structured therapy to restore movement, speech, and cognitive function after a stroke.

Learn more
View All Procedures
Packages

Treatment packages.

Transparent, all-inclusive packages designed to give patients clarity on costs from the start.

Comprehensive Migraine Care

Full diagnosis and ongoing management plan for chronic and episodic migraine patients.

Rs.4,500 - Rs.9,000
ConsultationEEG if neededMedication planFollow-up
Learn more

Stroke Rehabilitation Package

Comprehensive post-stroke recovery programme including neurological assessment and therapy sessions.

Rs.8,500 - Rs.25,000
Neuro assessmentPhysio sessionsSpeech therapyProgress monitoring
Learn more

Epilepsy Management Programme

Complete epilepsy workup and long-term management with regular follow-up and EEG monitoring.

Rs.6,000 - Rs.15,000
EEGMRI referralMedication planSeizure diary review
Learn more

Neuro Wellness Check

Preventive neurological assessment for individuals with family history of brain or nerve disorders.

Rs.2,500 - Rs.5,000
Full neuro examCognitive screenRisk assessmentReport included
Learn more
View All Packages
How We Work

Four steps that put you in control.

No surprises. No unexplained decisions. You know what's happening and why -- at every stage.

Step 01

Detailed Consultation

Thorough review of your neurological history, symptoms, and treatment goals. Every question gets answered.

Step 02

Clinical Diagnosis

Targeted investigations -- EEG, NCS, or MRI referral -- to identify the exact nature and severity of your condition.

Step 03

Personalised Plan

A treatment plan built around your diagnosis, lifestyle, and recovery timeline -- no generic protocols.

Step 04

Treatment & Support

Expert procedures with close monitoring, follow-up consultations, and support through full neurological recovery.

Clinical Transparency

What you should know before any procedure.

We believe informed patients make better decisions. Here are the facts -- clearly.

Success Rates

Botox for chronic migraine achieves 70-80% reduction in headache days. Epilepsy management achieves seizure control in over 70% of patients with appropriate medications. A personalised estimate is provided at your first consultation.

Results may vary based on individual diagnosis and clinical response.

Possible Risks

All neurological procedures carry some risk. Botox injections may cause temporary neck soreness or mild weakness. EEG and NCS are non-invasive with minimal risk. Every risk is discussed openly before treatment begins.

Every clinical risk is disclosed and explained before you decide.

Side Effects

Common effects from neurological medications include initial drowsiness or mild GI discomfort during the adjustment period. These are normal and managed through follow-up monitoring.

Post-treatment support and guidance is provided to every patient.
